en.extract:
The Malaita fantail (Rhipidura malaitae) is a fantail endemic to Malaita in the Solomon Islands.

The '''Malaita fantail''' ('''''Rhipidura malaitae''''') is a [[fantail]] [[endemic (ecology)|endemic]] to [[Malaita]] in the [[Solomon Islands]].
